projectDescription: A responsive single-page website for a liquor store, built with HTML5, CSS3 advanced techniques, and Bootstrap 5.
keyFeatures: Responsive design using Bootstrap 5 grid system
Custom CSS3 animations and hover transitions
Sticky dark navigation bar with collapsible mobile menu
Product showcase cards with hover effects and red glow shadows
Contact form with styled inputs and focus effects
Dark-themed UI with gold and red accent colors
publicApiSurface: styles.css — custom CSS3 overrides and animations
Bootstrap 5.3.3 — CDN-loaded CSS and JS bundle
